ref.pp:
/-!
# The `recover` tactic modifier

This defines the `recover` tactic modifier, which can be used to debug cases where goals
are not closed correctly. `recover tacs` for a tactic (or tactic sequence) `tacs`
applies the tactics and then adds goals
that are not closed, starting from the original goal.
-/

fun mvars => do
  let s ← get
  set ∅
  let r ←
    forIn mvars s fun mvarId r =>

          else
            let s := s.insert mvarId;
            do
            pure PUnit.unit
            pure (ForInStep.yield s)
  let s : Std.HashSet MVarId := r
  set s
  Array.forM go mvars

term.value:
fun mdecl => do
  addMVars mdecl.type
  forIn mdecl.lctx PUnit.unit fun ldecl r => do
      addMVars ldecl.type
      match ldecl.value? with
        | some val => do
          addMVars val
          pure (ForInStep.yield PUnit.unit)
        | x => do
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield PUnit.unit)
  let __do_lift ← getDelayedMVarAssignment? mvarId
  match __do_lift with
    | some ass =>
      let pendingMVarId := ass.mvarIdPending;
      do
      let __do_lift ← pendingMVarId.isAssigned <||> pendingMVarId.isDelayedAssigned
      let __do_jp : PUnit → StateRefT' IO.RealWorld (Std.HashSet MVarId) MetaM Unit := fun y => go pendingMVarId
      if __do_lift = true then do
          let y ← pure PUnit.unit
          __do_jp y
        else do
          let y ← modify fun x => x.insert pendingMVarId
          __do_jp y
    | x => pure PUnit.unit

/--
Get all metavariables which `mvarId` depends on. These are the metavariables
which occur in the target or local context or delayed assignment (if any) of
`mvarId`, plus the metavariables which occur in these metavariables, etc.
-/
partial def getUnassignedGoalMVarDependencies (mvarId : MVarId) :
    MetaM (Std.HashSet MVarId) :=
  return (← go mvarId |>.run {}).snd
where
    /-- auxiliary function for `getUnassignedGoalMVarDependencies` -/
    addMVars (e : Expr) : StateRefT (Std.HashSet MVarId) MetaM Unit := do
      let mvars ← getMVars e
      let mut s ← get
      set ({} : Std.HashSet MVarId) -- Ensure that `s` is not shared.
      for mvarId in mvars do
        unless ← mvarId.isDelayedAssigned do
          s := s.insert mvarId
      set s
      mvars.forM go
    /-- auxiliary function for `getUnassignedGoalMVarDependencies` -/
    go (mvarId : MVarId) : StateRefT (Std.HashSet MVarId) MetaM Unit :=
      withIncRecDepth do
        let mdecl ← mvarId.getDecl
        addMVars mdecl.type
        for ldecl in mdecl.lctx do
          addMVars ldecl.type
          if let (some val) := ldecl.value? then
            addMVars val
        if let (some ass) ← getDelayedMVarAssignment? mvarId then
          let pendingMVarId := ass.mvarIdPending
          unless ← pendingMVarId.isAssigned <||> pendingMVarId.isDelayedAssigned do
            modify (·.insert pendingMVarId)
          go pendingMVarId

/-- `recover tacs` applies the tactic (sequence) `tacs` and then re-adds goals that were
incorrectly marked as closed. This helps to debug issues where a tactic closes goals without
solving them (i.e. goals were removed from the MetaM state without the metavariable
being assigned), resulting in the error "(kernel) declaration has metavariables". -/

          let unassignedMVarDependencies ← liftM (getUnassignedGoalMVarDependencies mvarId)
          let unassigned : Std.HashSet MVarId := unassigned.insertMany unassignedMVarDependencies.toList

        if __do_lift = true then do

  let __do_lift ← getGoals
  setGoals (__do_lift ++ unassigned.toList).eraseDups

term.value:
fun originalGoals => do
  evalTactic tacs.raw
  let unassigned : Std.HashSet MVarId := ∅
  let r ←
    forIn originalGoals unassigned fun mvarId r =>
        let unassigned := r;
        do
        let __do_lift ← mvarId.isAssigned <||> mvarId.isDelayedAssigned
        let __do_jp : Std.HashSet MVarId → PUnit → TacticM (ForInStep (Std.HashSet MVarId)) := fun unassigned y => do
          let unassignedMVarDependencies ← liftM (getUnassignedGoalMVarDependencies mvarId)
          let unassigned : Std.HashSet MVarId := unassigned.insertMany unassignedMVarDependencies.toList
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield unassigned)
        if __do_lift = true then do
            let y ← pure PUnit.unit
            __do_jp unassigned y
          else
            let unassigned := unassigned.insert mvarId;
            do
            let y ← pure PUnit.unit
            __do_jp unassigned y
  let unassigned : Std.HashSet MVarId := r
  let __do_lift ← getGoals
  setGoals (__do_lift ++ unassigned.toList).eraseDups

    let unassignedMVarDependencies ← getUnassignedGoalMVarDependencies mvarId
    unassigned := unassigned.insertMany unassignedMVarDependencies.toList
  setGoals <| ((← getGoals) ++ unassigned.toList).eraseDups

 |  _  =>  no_error_if_unused%  throwUnsupportedSyntax
